layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Text-first, extremely generous negative space, high contrast.

grid_patterns.projects: Asymmetrical bento. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Mix col-span-8 and col-span-4 to avoid uniform squares.

components.buttons: Flat, 1px solid border (#333), transparent background, white text. Hover: bg-white text-black transition-all duration-300. Use JetBrains Mono for button text.
components.cards: No visible background (or very subtle #050505), 1px solid border (#222), p-8. No border radius (rounded-none) or very sharp (rounded-sm) for editorial feel.
components.navigation: Sticky top, backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/50, border-b border-[#222]. Minimal links.
components.upload_ui: For profile photo: group-hover overlay with a subtle camera icon (lucide-react). For resume: A small subtle 'Manage' link in the footer or nav opening a Shadcn Dialog with a simple drag-drop area.

motion.hover_states: Subtle inversion (black to white) or border color change (#222 to #555).
motion.page_load: Fade up with Framer Motion (y: 20, opacity: 0 to 1, stagger children).

images.description: Used as a subtle, very low opacity (10%) background texture in the hero section.
Placeholder image for project cards until the user uploads their own.
Abstract placeholder for the profile picture.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: Cormorant Garamond, Outfit, JetBrains Mono.
Configure tailwind.config.js with pure black background, custom gray scale, and the selected fonts.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layouts and Shadcn specifically for the Contact Form and Upload UI Dialog.
Ensure the hero section highlights 'Shikha Yadav' prominently using Cormorant Garamond font-light.
Profile photo should have a group-hover state revealing an upload button. The Resume upload should be accessible via a small 'Manage Resume' button that opens a Shadcn Dialog.
Implement an asymmetrical bento grid for the Projects section to avoid standard uniform cards. Mix large and small spans.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, nav links, form inputs).
